name: Pumpkin Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart Dutch oven, brown the beef in butter.
2. Add onion and celery; sauté until browned.
3. Stir in 4 cups water, salt, thyme, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Cover and cook for 1 hour.
5. Cut 2 inches off the top of the pumpkin. Trim the rim of the pumpkin bottom to form points and scoop out seeds.
6. Peel the top and trimmings; cut into 1-inch cubes.
7. Add the cubed pumpkin to the beef after 1 hour. Cook for an additional 30 minutes or until tender.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F.
9. Bake the pumpkin shell for 20 minutes.
10. Stir flour into 1 cup water; add the stew with peas. Cook, stirring until thickened.
11. Spoon into shells and serve.
